reviews.comment: These guys are AMAZING!! My boyfriend put diesel into our petrol hire car; having ignored the fact that in Argentina it is not self service petrol stations. The guys were so so sooo helpful and pushed the car to safety and called their off duty mechanic to come in to drain the diesel out the car. It took longer than expected and more difficult to do but they did it and then they didn’t even charge us anything. How kind!! And lucky they didn’t because my boyfriend  then went and lost his bank card! Bad day for him; but lucky we had these petrol station angels to save us
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/8137682330194139512/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM1X3ZtdDRBRRAB

reviews.comment: We had a little mishap The manager and his engineer were brilliant. Went completely out of their way to help. Above and beyond the expected. Thank you!
